context: Tests whether the response correctly maps scenarios to load balancing algorithms.

checklist.name: Stateless API: Round Robin
checklist.description: Recommends Round Robin (or Random) for identical stateless servers — simplest and sufficient

checklist.name: Mixed servers: Weighted or Least Connections
checklist.description: Recommends Weighted Round Robin, Weighted Least Connections, or Least Connections for heterogeneous server sizes

checklist.name: Chat app: Sticky Sessions / IP Hash
checklist.description: Recommends sticky sessions (session affinity), IP hash, or consistent hashing for the WebSocket use case

checklist.name: Explains why each algorithm fits
checklist.description: Provides reasoning for each choice, not just the algorithm name

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Load balancing algorithm descriptions and behaviors are technically correct
